curatorNote:
Fidenza is the definitive Art Blocks collection and a cornerstone of the digital art canon: 999 flow-field compositions that set the benchmark for long-form on-chain generative art.

Hivemind's Fidenza holding is built around core traits that show the range of Hobbs' algorithm, including White Mono, Spiral, Black & White and Micro, and is intended to read as a coherent sub-collection rather than a representative sample.
